title: Squirrel Removal in Hunts Point, Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Hunts Point, Bronx. Humane extraction, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving 10474. Call for same-day service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Hunts Point home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout the 10474 area, from residential buildings near Barretto Point Park to commercial properties along Hunts Point Avenue. Our humane removal methods ensure squirrels are safely extracted and prevented from returning to your property.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Hunts Point residents and businesses, we understand the unique wildlife challenges facing this waterfront Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians provide fast, humane squirrel removal with guaranteed exclusion work to protect your property year-round.
localContext: Hunts Point's mix of industrial facilities, older residential buildings, and proximity to the Bronx River creates ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially in attics and commercial warehouses. From the food distribution area to neighborhoods near Lafayette Avenue, our team knows the local building structures and common squirrel entry points specific to this community.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Hunts Point?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Hunts Point typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Hunts Point property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Hunts Point and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. Most squirrel removals are completed within 3-5 days, including trapping, exclusion, and initial cleanup.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for squirrel removal?
faqs.answer: We use humane live trapping and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. After removal, we seal all entry points with durable materials, install preventative barriers, and clean affected areas to remove nesting materials and droppings.

faqs.question: Do squirrels in Hunts Point cause property damage?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through roof materials, soffits, and electrical wiring, creating fire hazards. They also contaminate insulation with urine and feces, and their gnawing can compromise structural integrity in both residential and commercial buildings common throughout Hunts Point.
